name: postfast
description: Schedule and manage social media posts via PostFast
long_description: Connect Claude to PostFast to schedule and manage social media posts across 11 platforms using natural language. Create, schedule, and delete posts on Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X, Facebook, YouTube, Threads, BlueSky, Pinterest, Telegram, and Google Business Profile. Supports batch scheduling (up to 15 posts), media uploads, platform-specific controls, and post analytics (impressions, reach, likes, comments, shares).

api_key.title: PostFast API Key
api_key.description: Your workspace API key from PostFast → Settings → API Key

tools.name: list_posts
tools.description: List posts with filters (platform, status, date range)

tools.name: create_posts
tools.description: Create and schedule posts (batch up to 15)

tools.name: upload_media
tools.description: Upload a local file and get a media key

tools.name: get_upload_urls
tools.description: Get signed URLs to upload media files

tools.name: list_pinterest_boards
tools.description: Get Pinterest boards for an account

tools.name: list_youtube_playlists
tools.description: Get YouTube playlists for an account

tools.name: list_gbp_locations
tools.description: Get Google Business Profile locations for an account

tools.name: generate_connect_link
tools.description: Generate a link for clients to connect accounts

tools.name: get_post_analytics
tools.description: Fetch published posts with performance metrics (impressions, reach, likes, etc.)
